'''Regolith Prime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Regolith system/Legends|Regolith system]] where [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] had a listening outpost.

{{Planet-stub}}
